name: 02 - LLM Spend
description: Operator-facing spend dashboards: per-provider cost breakdown, monthly trend, and per-virtual-key top spenders.

native.query: SELECT gen_ai_provider_name AS provider, round(sum(cost_usd), 4) AS spend FROM gateway_traces WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY provider ORDER BY spend DESC
SELECT toDate(timestamp) AS day, gen_ai_provider_name AS provider, round(sum(cost_usd), 4) AS spend FROM gateway_traces WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY GROUP BY day, provider ORDER BY day

cards.name: Top 20 virtual keys by spend (last 30 days)

native.query: SELECT virtual_key_id AS vkey, round(sum(cost_usd), 4) AS spend, count() AS requests FROM gateway_traces WHERE timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY AND virtual_key_id != '' GROUP BY vkey ORDER BY spend DESC LIMIT 20
